channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Man Released After Being Detained by Police for Questioning in Connection with Nancy Guthrie Abduction: Reports
item.description: Nancy, the mother of 'Today' co-host Savannah Guthrie, hasn't been seen or heard from since Jan. 31

item.title: Whitney Houston's Death: Revisiting the Legendary Singer's Final Moments 14 Years Later
item.description: Legendary singer Whitney Houston was found dead at a Beverly Hills hotel in February 2012

item.title: Jennifer Lawrence’s Sleek Adidas Sneakers Are Discounted for Presidents Day — Plus More Popular Styles from $29
item.description: Grab the platform version of the pair Jennifer Aniston wears

item.title: Kelly Rowland Is 45! See the Grammy-Winning Singer's Cutest Family Photos with Her Two Sons and Husband Tim Weatherspoon
item.description: The "Like This" songstress shares her sons — Titan Jewell and Noah Jon — with husband Tim Weatherspoon

item.title: Rihanna Makes a Chic Run to the Grocery Store in L.A., Plus Emma Stone, Kate Hudson, Gigi Hadid and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Man Detained and Released in Nancy Guthrie Investigation Speaks Out
item.description: The man detained Tuesday and questioned in relation to the Nancy Guthrie investigation has spoken out ... telling reporters at his doorstep in Rio Ric...

item.title: Chix On Netflix -- Guess The Hot Actress!
item.description: Wednesday is comin' in HOT with a mid-week treat ... Can you guess the Netflix star?! Her claim to fame is "Money Heist," but when she's not on your s...

item.title: Boxer Xander Zayas Reveals Bad Bunny Picked Him Over Models For Halftime Show
item.description: Champion boxer Xander Zayas was handpicked by Bad Bunny for his role in the Super Bowl halftime show ... a part that was originally intended to be pla...

item.title: Bodybuilder Jayne Trcka, Miss Mann in 'Scary Movie,' Cause Of Death Released
item.description: Bodybuilder Jayne Trcka -- who played Miss Mann in "Scary Movie" -- died from heart and circulation issues ... TMZ has learned. The San Diego County M...

item.title: Pageant Winner Kayleigh Bush Rips Miss America After Being Stripped of Crown
item.description: Beauty pageant winner Kayleigh Bush used to admire Miss America, but now she's ripping the organization for being unable to define what a woman is ......
